title: Gegenbauer Elektrotechnik
description: ***.at Gegenbauer Elektrotechnik & IT GmbH is a Vienna-based service provider specializing in comprehensive electrical engineering and IT solutions for businesses.Evolving from a sole proprietorship with over 30 years of experience, the company was officially established in 2015 to offer end-to-end planning and implementation.They focus on delivering customized technical infrastructures, professional support, and employee training to meet the diverse needs of their clients
